x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: ATF test suite coverage is a prerequisite for safely deploying AI-generated code. Without adequate test coverage, AI-generated scripts and flows cannot be validated before promotion, increasing deployment risk.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Build ATF test suites to validate custom applications and enable AI test generation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c06
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[ATF test suite coverage is a prerequisite for safely deploying AI-generated code. Without adequate test coverage, AI-generated scripts and flows cannot be validated before promotion, increasing deployment risk.]]></ai_justification><check_name>ATF Test Suite Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sys_atf_test_suite");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sys_atf_test_suite not found", finding: "ATF Test Suite table is not available. Verify the Automated Test Framework plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sys_atf_test_suite");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 10) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " test suites", finding: c + " ATF test suites found. Sufficient test coverage to validate AI-generated code safely." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " test suites", finding: c + " ATF test suite(s) found (target: 10+). Limited test coverage increases risk when deploying Now Assist generated code." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "0 test suites", finding: "No ATF test suites found. Without test coverage, AI-generated code cannot be safely validated before deployment." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CREATOR</module><number>CHK0000561</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Build ATF test suites to validate custom applications and enable AI test generation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>1bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c06</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>ATF Test Suite Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_1bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c06</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
